metadata.description: Comprehensive Kali Linux tools reference database - Educational purposes only

Information Gathering.name: nmap
Information Gathering.short_desc: Network discovery and security auditing tool
Information Gathering.full_description: Nmap (Network Mapper) is the industry standard for network discovery and security auditing.
Information Gathering.safety_note: Only scan networks you have permission to test.

Information Gathering.name: theHarvester
Information Gathering.full_description: Gathers emails, subdomains, and personnel from public sources.

Vulnerability Analysis.name: nikto
Vulnerability Analysis.full_description: Open source web server scanner that checks for dangerous files and outdated versions.

Vulnerability Analysis.name: nuclei
Vulnerability Analysis.full_description: Uses YAML templates to scan for vulnerabilities.

Web Application Analysis.name: burpsuite
Web Application Analysis.full_description: Comprehensive web app security testing tool with proxy, scanner, and intruder.

Web Application Analysis.name: sqlmap
Web Application Analysis.full_description: Automates detecting and exploiting SQL injection flaws.

Web Application Analysis.name: gobuster
Web Application Analysis.full_description: Used to discover hidden directories and files on web servers.

Password Attacks.name: hashcat
Password Attacks.full_description: World's fastest GPU-accelerated password recovery tool.
Password Attacks.safety_note: CRITICAL: Only crack hashes you have authority to test.

Password Attacks.name: hydra
Password Attacks.full_description: Supports numerous protocols for brute force attacks.
Password Attacks.safety_note: CRITICAL: Only brute force authorized systems.

Password Attacks.name: john
Password Attacks.full_description: Fast password cracker supporting hundreds of hash types.

Wireless Attacks.name: aircrack-ng
Wireless Attacks.full_description: Complete suite for WiFi network security assessment.
Wireless Attacks.safety_note: CRITICAL: Only test networks you own.

Wireless Attacks.name: airmon-ng
Wireless Attacks.full_description: Enables monitor mode on wireless interfaces.

Exploitation Tools.name: metasploit
Exploitation Tools.full_description: Industry-standard pentesting framework with exploits and payloads.

Exploitation Tools.name: msfvenom
Exploitation Tools.full_description: Generates and encodes payloads for Metasploit.

Forensics.name: autopsy
Forensics.full_description: GUI interface to The Sleuth Kit for disk analysis.

Forensics.name: volatility
Forensics.full_description: Analyzes memory dumps from running systems.

Forensics.name: binwalk
Forensics.full_description: Analyzes binary files for embedded content.
